description: You are a social studies curriculum developer creating a lesson plan on global demographic transitions. Download the Gapminder dataset from 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vega/vega-datasets/master/data/gapminder.json' to '/home/ga/Documents/gapminder.json'. Extract the exact life expectancy ('life_expect') and fertility rate ('fertility') for Rwanda, Afghanistan, and Japan for the years 1955 and 2005 without rounding. Create a document titled 'Demographic Transition Worksheet' containing the section headings 'Lesson Overview', 'Data Table', and 'Student Questions'. Populate the 'Data Table' with the 12 extracted numeric values and save the document in ODT format to '/home/ga/Documents/demographics_worksheet.odt'.
